faq_articles.title: Photoshoot cancellation policy
faq_articles.content:
Our standard photoshoot cancellation policy applies to all studio spaces unless otherwise stated on the studio page.

• Cancellations more than 7 days before the booking start time: full refund to the original payment method.
• Cancellations 3–7 days before the booking: 50% refund, or 100% credit toward a future booking within 6 months.
• Cancellations less than 72 hours before the booking: non‑refundable.

Reschedules requested more than 72 hours before the booking start time are free, subject to studio availability. Reschedules requested within 72 hours are treated as a cancellation plus a new booking.

Some studios may have stricter policies; if so, the policy shown on the studio detail page will override this default.

faq_articles.title: How do I reschedule my booking?
faq_articles.content:
You can request a reschedule from your booking confirmation page or email.

For photoshoot studios, reschedules requested more than 72 hours before the start time are usually free, subject to availability. Within 72 hours, reschedule requests may be treated as a cancellation and a new booking according to the applicable cancellation policy.

If you need to reschedule a weekend booking (Friday evening through Sunday), we recommend contacting support as early as possible so we can help you find an alternative date and time.

faq_articles.title: Event venue cancellation policy
faq_articles.content:
Event venue cancellations typically follow a stricter policy than photoshoot studios due to the longer rental times and staffing.

While policies vary by venue, the most common terms are:
• More than 30 days before the event: full refund minus processing fees.
• 14–30 days before the event: 50% refund, or 75% credit toward a future event within 12 months.
• Less than 14 days before the event: non‑refundable.

Always review the "Cancellation" section on the venue detail page, as some partners may offer more flexible or stricter terms.

faq_articles.title: When am I charged for my booking?
faq_articles.content:
For most bookings, the full amount is charged at the time of booking. This secures your date and time with the studio or venue.

Larger event venue bookings may allow a deposit (typically 30–50%) at checkout, with the remaining balance due 7–30 days before the event. If a deposit option is available, it will be shown during checkout.

Gift card purchases are always charged in full at the time of purchase.

faq_articles.title: How long do refunds take?
faq_articles.content:
If you cancel a booking and are eligible for a refund, we submit the refund to your original payment method within 1–3 business days.

Most banks post refunds within 5–10 business days. Some international cards may take up to 30 days. Once we process the refund, we will email you a confirmation with the refund amount and reference ID.

faq_articles.title: What is included with a photoshoot studio booking?
faq_articles.content:
Each studio is unique, but most bookings include exclusive use of the space, basic furnishings shown in the listing, and access to restrooms.

Some studios include lighting equipment, backdrops, or props at no extra charge, while others offer them as add‑ons. The "Amenities" section on each studio page lists what is included. If you are unsure, contact us or the host before booking.

faq_articles.title: Photoshoot studio rules and overtime
faq_articles.content:
You are expected to arrive and leave within your reserved time, including setup and teardown. Entering the studio early or leaving late may result in overtime charges billed in 30‑minute or 1‑hour increments, depending on the studio.

Shoes on furniture, smoking, open flames, glitter, and confetti are prohibited in most studios unless explicitly allowed. Please review the "Rules" section on the studio page and in your confirmation email.

faq_articles.title: Gift card terms & expiration
faq_articles.content:
Our digital gift cards can be used toward any eligible photoshoot or event booking, as well as add‑ons, unless otherwise specified.

Gift cards do not expire and have no inactivity fees. They are non‑refundable once purchased, but can be transferred to another recipient by contacting support.

To redeem, enter the gift card code on the payment step at checkout. If your booking total is less than the gift card value, the remaining balance stays on the card for future use.

faq_articles.title: How are digital gift cards delivered?
faq_articles.content:
Digital gift cards are sent by email to the recipient address you provide at checkout. You can choose to send them immediately or schedule delivery for a future date.

The email will include the gift amount, a personalized message if you added one, and a unique code the recipient can use at checkout.

faq_articles.title: How do I contact support?
faq_articles.content:
You can reach our support team in three ways:

1. Use the "Contact Us" form in the Help Center for general questions or booking changes.
2. Reply directly to any booking confirmation email you have received.
3. For urgent day‑of issues, use the emergency contact number listed in your confirmation email.

We typically respond to non‑urgent questions within one business day.

faq_articles.title: Do I need an account to book?
faq_articles.content:
You can check out as a guest without creating an account. We will ask for your email address so we can send your confirmation and event details.

Creating an account lets you view past bookings, save favorite spaces, and manage reschedule or cancellation requests more easily, but it is not required.

spaces.name: Daylight Loft Studio – Small
spaces.description: Cozy daylight studio with south‑facing windows, white walls, and boho accents. Ideal for lifestyle portraits, brand shoots, and small group sessions.
spaces.policies: Standard photoshoot terms apply. Setup and teardown must be within your reserved time. No smoking, glitter, or open flames. Overtime is billed in 1‑hour increments according to our photoshoot cancellation policy.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 7+ days, 50% refund 3–7 days, no refund within 72 hours; free reschedule 72+ hours.

spaces.name: Loft Studio A – Flexible Event & Photoshoot Space
spaces.description: Large corner loft with exposed brick, tall windows, and moveable furniture. Perfect for photoshoots, intimate parties, and pop‑up events. Supports packages like Standard Party and Premium Party, as well as weekly recurring bookings.
spaces.policies: All setup and cleanup must occur within your reserved hours. Furniture may be rearranged but must be returned to its original layout. Parties must end by 11:00 PM. Photoshoot bookings follow the standard photoshoot cancellation policy; event bookings may have different terms shown at checkout.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Photoshoots: standard policy (full refund 7+ days, 50% 3–7 days). Events: partial refund up to 14 days.

spaces.name: Heritage Brick Studio B
spaces.description: Medium‑sized studio with original brick walls, large industrial windows, and seamless backdrop options for editorial and portrait work.
spaces.policies: Commercial and editorial shoots welcome. Please protect brick walls from tape or adhesives. Standard photoshoot cancellation and overtime rules apply.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Standard photoshoot cancellation policy; free reschedule 72+ hours.

spaces.name: Cyclorama Studio C
spaces.description: Full cyc wall studio with blackout capability and controlled lighting environment, suitable for fashion, product, and video shoots.
spaces.policies: Cyc wall must be protected from scuffs; repaint fees may apply for damage. No food or drinks on the cyc. Standard photoshoot cancellation applies.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Standard photoshoot policy; repaint fees may be charged for damage.

spaces.name: Minimal White Box Studio
spaces.description: Clean all‑white studio with high ceilings and large windows. Ideal for branding shoots, fashion, and editorial work.
spaces.policies: No colored smoke, glitter, or confetti. Please use only painter's tape on walls. Standard photoshoot cancellation policy applies.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 7+ days; 50% refund 3–7 days; non‑refundable within 72 hours.

spaces.name: Downtown Creative Suite
spaces.description: Versatile studio with multiple styled corners, including a boho lounge, desk setup, and neutral backdrop. Popular for content creators and branding sessions.
spaces.policies: Please return furniture and props to their original locations. Standard photoshoot cancellation and overtime policies apply.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Standard photoshoot cancellation; reschedules subject to availability.

spaces.name: Cozy Home Studio
spaces.description: Home‑style studio with bedroom and living room setups. Best for couples, newborn, and lifestyle sessions up to 4 people.
spaces.policies: Shoes off inside the studio. No large groups or events. Standard photoshoot cancellation applies.

spaces.name: Grand Ballroom East
spaces.description: Elegant hotel ballroom with crystal chandeliers, built‑in AV, and flexible floor plans for weddings, galas, and large celebrations.
spaces.policies: Events require a signed contract and security deposit. Final guest count and remaining balance are due 14 days before the event. Outside catering must provide proof of insurance and licenses.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 30+ days; 50% refund 14–30 days; non‑refundable within 14 days.

spaces.name: Modern Loft Event Space
spaces.description: Bright loft with polished concrete floors, string lights, and an open layout ideal for cocktail parties, launches, and workshops.
spaces.policies: Standard venue rental is a 4‑hour minimum. Noise must be kept within city ordinances after 10 PM. Outside catering and bar services are welcome with prior approval.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 30+ days; 50% refund 14–30 days; credit only within 14 days.

spaces.name: Studio Event Hall – Mixed Use
spaces.description: Hybrid studio and event hall designed for photo‑friendly celebrations, baby showers, and corporate mixers. Neutral walls and flexible lighting.
spaces.policies: Suitable for both events and studio‑style shoots. Decorations must be freestanding or attached with non‑damaging materials. Outside catering is allowed with prior notice.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 21+ days; 50% refund 7–21 days; non‑refundable within 7 days.

spaces.name: Garden Terrace Venue
spaces.description: Semi‑outdoor garden terrace with pergola, perfect for intimate celebrations and cocktail receptions.
spaces.policies: Weather backup plans are recommended. In‑house catering is required; outside catering is not permitted. Music must end by 10 PM.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 30+ days; credit only within 30 days.

spaces.name: Rooftop City View
spaces.description: Open‑air rooftop with panoramic skyline views, best suited for evening receptions and parties.
spaces.policies: Events are weather‑dependent. Tents and heaters are available at an additional cost. Outside catering is allowed; vendors must be approved in advance.
spaces.cancellation_policy_summary: Full refund 30+ days; weather reschedule options available within 30 days.

packages.name: Minimal Studio Half-Day

packages.name: Newborn Lifestyle Bundle
packages.description: 3-hour cozy home-style session designed for newborn and family portraits, with extra time for feeding and breaks.

packages.name: Ballroom Essentials 4-Hour Package
packages.description: 4-hour ballroom rental including tables, chairs, basic AV, and onsite coordinator. Suitable for receptions and corporate dinners.

packages.name: Wedding Reception 6-Hour Package
packages.description: 6-hour evening ballroom package with upgraded linens, dance floor, and access to bridal suite.

packages.name: Loft Social 4-Hour Package
packages.description: 4-hour modern loft rental with cocktail tables, string lights, and basic sound system. Ideal for launches and mixers.

packages.name: Loft Signature 6-Hour Package
packages.description: 6-hour package with extended event time, upgraded seating plan, and dedicated venue host.

packages.name: Studio Hall 4-Hour Celebration
packages.description: 4-hour mixed-use hall rental perfect for baby showers and small receptions, including use of sound system and kitchenette.

packages.name: Sunset Soirée 4-Hour Package
packages.description: 4-hour rooftop event timed around sunset, with string lights and bar area access.
